raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Reviewing the section centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the scheme's description, stability analysis, and proof claims.","R1.3":"The delegation expects alignment check between the reported benchmarks, speedups, and claims of order and stability.","R1.4":"Assessing novelty against prior IMEX schemes is a central part of reviewing this contribution.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to a section review.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage for mentioned methods like SDIRK and ARK4 is expected in the review.","RX.1":"The review should identify any undisclosed uncertainties in the stability regime or benchmark assumptions.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims about unconditional stability and speedups is crucial in evaluating the section.","RX.3":"Ensuring the content adheres to the scope of adaptive IMEX methods without extraneous topics is important.","RX.4":"The review must consider potential harms if the method is misapplied in stiff systems for critical infrastructure simulations.","RX.5":"Traceability of the benchmarks and test problems like Brusselator to their sources should be verified in the review."}}

rationale.R1.2: Reviewing the section centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the scheme's description, stability analysis, and proof claims.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation expects alignment check between the reported benchmarks, speedups, and claims of order and stability.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior IMEX schemes is a central part of reviewing this contribution.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to a section review.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage for mentioned methods like SDIRK and ARK4 is expected in the review.
rationale.RX.1: The review should identify any undisclosed uncertainties in the stability regime or benchmark assumptions.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims about unconditional stability and speedups is crucial in evaluating the section.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the content adheres to the scope of adaptive IMEX methods without extraneous topics is important.
rationale.RX.4: The review must consider potential harms if the method is misapplied in stiff systems for critical infrastructure simulations.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability of the benchmarks and test problems like Brusselator to their sources should be verified in the review.
